title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your account settings and preferences

durationThresholds.title: Video Length Categories
durationThresholds.description: Customize the duration boundaries used for the short, medium, and long video filters
durationThresholds.validationError: Short threshold must be less than long threshold

watchPreferences.title: Video Watch Preferences
watchPreferences.description: Configure how videos are automatically marked as watched
watchPreferences.loadError: Failed to load watch preferences. Please try again.
watchPreferences.autoMarkDescription: When enabled, videos will be automatically marked as watched when you reach the configured threshold percentage
watchPreferences.thresholdDescription: Videos will be marked as watched when you've viewed this percentage of the video
